description: Machine-readable ACL matrix (security-broker-contract.md §4). The provisioning scripts create these key files with the exact ownership + mode below; provisioning.separation.test asserts no key is readable by more identities than its row lists. Custody (D9): root-provisioned files under a per-identity 0700 dir. On macOS the dir lives under /usr/local/etc/atlas/keys; on Linux under /etc/atlas/keys. (V1 note: file-based per-identity dirs are used on BOTH OSes rather than macOS login keychains, because the broker/egress run as non-login service accounts that cannot unlock a login keychain; the separation test verifies identity-scoped read access either way.)

agent.purpose: unprivileged CLI + parser + workflow; network-denied UID

atlas-broker.purpose: protected-ref writes, approval verification, audit append, WORM anchor

atlas-egress.purpose: sole provider-credential holder + sole outbound-network process; NO vault access (D18)

trusted-cli.purpose: the unprivileged CLI process that writes the ledger owns backup + quarantine crypto (D13)

group.name: atlas-git
group.purpose: vault repo read (canonical) + object-store write; atlas-egress is deliberately excluded (D18 — internet-facing identity has no vault access)

keys.note: D20: broker hard-rejects signatures from this key unless ATLAS_TEST_MODE=1

SP-3: the enrolled signer registry (§9.2). Written by provisioning/enroll-signer.sh; an explicit file REPLACES key-file derivation, so the script materializes the derived entries first. p256 (Secure-Enclave) signers can ONLY enter here — never derived.

egressState.note: Cross-identity egress state (Task 2.8/#34): the sealed-quarantine spool the CLI drains + the egress-writable D19 budget file. Owner atlas-egress, group atlas-git, 2770 setgid — egress reaches it as OWNER, the CLI as GROUP; atlas-egress is still NOT an atlas-git member, so D18 holds.

egress.sock.note: atlas-git membership here is for the CLI client to reach egress over IPC; egress still has NO vault/object read (D18) — enforced by excluding atlas-egress from atlas-git AND by file ACLs on vault paths
